title: Sharing Calendars to clients
excerpt:
When attempting to share a calendar view of a project to a client, you are left with two choices. Sending a pdf, which you have to download a pdf of each month, or sending links to each month. 
This is exceptionally bad.…

posts.author: Gbolyard (Garrick Bolyard)
posts.cookedHtml:
When attempting to share a calendar view of a project to a client, you are left with two choices. Sending a pdf, which you have to download a pdf of each month, or sending links to each month.

This is exceptionally bad. This is a basic feature that is missing. I want clients to be able to see the full project in calendar form, without having to sign up for monday and add them as a viewer. I know that in todays technological world, having to sign up for an account to even open a garage door is the norm.

The Gantt view has full manipulate control for anyone with the view link, why is the calendar view once again lacking any iteration. This is very frustrating.

I do not want to send my client separate links for a 5 month long project. This is bad!

posts.author: DanielGrove (Daniel Grove)
posts.cookedHtml: I found from another post here if you undock the calendar and then share the link it will have navigation controls and a label on top! How strange. This should be fixed.

posts.author: DanielGrove (Daniel Grove)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree the lack of functions for a shared calendar is striking. Not even a month label on top!
